profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Cipta Sarana Medika Tbk, through its subsidiaries, owns and operates hospital in Indonesia. The company offers healthcare and physical treatment activities both for outpatient and inpatient care under private general, maternity, and specialized hospitals. It also provides medical services through internal medicine, pediatric, neurosurgery, obstetrics and gynecology, cardiology and vascular medicine, urology, pulmonology, orthopedics and traumatology, neurology, otorhinolaryngology, ophthalmology, medical rehabilitation, general dentistry, general practitioner, physiotherapy, oral and general surgery, as well as dermatology, venereology, and aesthetics clinics. In addition, the company offers healthpedia. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Sukabumi, Indonesia. PT Cipta Sarana Medika Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Siliwangi Djajakusumah Hospitals.
